text: a Visa transaction. Relief donations Visa and Visa Foundation provide financial donations for disaster relief in times of crises. Visa offers double matching for employee donations to select charities responding on the ground. Employees making a difference Visa encourages and supports employees to make an impact in ways that inspire them, whether that is through volunteering, giving or empowering people and communities in need. Volunteer Time Off Employees receive 16 hours of Volunteer Time Off. Mentorship and loan programmes Our workforce helps with small business mentorship and Kiva loan programmes. Dollars for Doers Employees earn $10 per hour of volunteering to give back to charity. Doing measurable good Small and microbusiness 50 M We are committed to digitally enable 50 million small and micro businesses worldwide by 2023, as part of our efforts to advance digital equity. Equity and Inclusion 500 M We met our goal to provide 500 million unbanked/underserved people access to digital payment accounts by 2020 and are continuing the work. Community 80 % We had 80% of our employees participate in Visa programmes to give back to their communities in 2022.* Discover Visa Foundation Visa Foundation seeks to support inclusive economies where everyone, everywhere can thrive.
